productDisplayName: Esprit Men Grand Victory White Dial Steel Watches

Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 9 mm Dial shape: Round Steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Rubber strap with a tang clasp Durable, scratch-resistant mineral crystal glass White dial with hour marking, numbered 12 o& rsquo clock marking, brand name below 12 o& rsquo clock and date socket at 4 o& rsquo clock Chronographic time display with quartz movement Screw to reset time and date Solid case back in stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it when washing hands or your car
